plates.description: Spiced tomato-cream curry with tender marinated chicken thigh.
Slow-simmered chicken thigh in spiced tomato-cream sauce, served over basmati rice

instructions.summary: Cut chicken thigh into 3 cm cubes. Combine with yoghurt, half the garam masala, half the cumin, and half the turmeric. Marinate for 20 minutes.
substeps: Cut chicken thigh into 3 cm cubes. Combine with yoghurt, half the garam masala, half the cumin, and half the turmeric. Marinate for 20 minutes.

instructions.summary: Heat ghee in a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the marinated chicken and sear for 4-5 minutes until golden on all sides. Remove and set aside.
substeps: Heat ghee in a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the marinated chicken and sear for 4-5 minutes until golden on all sides. Remove and set aside.

instructions.summary: In the same pan, add the diced onion and cook for 3 minutes until softened. Add garlic and ginger and cook for another 30 seconds.
substeps: In the same pan, add the diced onion and cook for 3 minutes until softened. Add garlic and ginger and cook for another 30 seconds.

instructions.summary: Add the remaining garam masala, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and Kashmiri chilli powder. Stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.
substeps: Add the remaining garam masala, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and Kashmiri chilli powder. Stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.

instructions.summary: Pour in the tomato passata and add salt. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
substeps: Pour in the tomato passata and add salt. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.

instructions.summary: Return the chicken to the pan and stir through the thickened cream. Simmer for 5 more minutes until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
substeps: Return the chicken to the pan and stir through the thickened cream. Simmer for 5 more minutes until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.

instructions.summary: Serve over cooked basmati rice, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.
substeps: Serve over cooked basmati rice, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.

instructions.summary: Cut chicken thigh into 3 cm cubes.
substeps: Cut chicken thigh into 3 cm cubes.

instructions.summary: Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and pan-fry for 6-7 minutes until cooked through and lightly golden.
substeps: Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and pan-fry for 6-7 minutes until cooked through and lightly golden.

instructions.summary: Pour in the jar sauce and thickened cream. Stir to coat the chicken and simmer for 3-4 minutes until the sauce is heated through.
substeps: Pour in the jar sauce and thickened cream. Stir to coat the chicken and simmer for 3-4 minutes until the sauce is heated through.

instructions.summary: Serve over cooked basmati rice, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.
substeps: Serve over cooked basmati rice, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.

instructions.summary: Cut chicken thigh into 3 cm cubes. Place in slow cooker with the jar sauce. Stir to coat.
substeps: Cut chicken thigh into 3 cm cubes. Place in slow cooker with the jar sauce. Stir to coat.

instructions.summary: Cook on high for 4 hours or low for 6-8 hours.
substeps: Cook on high for 4 hours or low for 6-8 hours.

instructions.summary: Stir through the thickened cream during the last 10 minutes of cooking.
substeps: Stir through the thickened cream during the last 10 minutes of cooking.

instructions.summary: Serve over cooked basmati rice, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.
substeps: Serve over cooked basmati rice, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.

plates.description: Chocolate, peanut butter, cream — the pinch of salt makes it taste like a thick shake, not a sad gym drink

instructions.summary: Add the milk, cream, and yoghurt to the blender first to give the dry ingredients something to blend into.
substeps: Add the milk, cream, and yoghurt to the blender first to give the dry ingredients something to blend into.

instructions.summary: Add the frozen banana, whey, cocoa powder, peanut butter, honey, and salt.
substeps: Add the frozen banana, whey, cocoa powder, peanut butter, honey, and salt.

instructions.summary: Start at low speed for 5 seconds to break up the frozen banana, then increase to high speed.
substeps: Start at low speed for 5 seconds to break up the frozen banana, then increase to high speed.

instructions.summary: Blend on high for 60 seconds until completely smooth and silky. The thickened cream should be fully incorporated.
substeps: Blend on high for 60 seconds until completely smooth and silky. The thickened cream should be fully incorporated.

instructions.summary: Pour into a large glass. The salt is essential — it transforms the flavour from "sad gym shake" to "Maccas thick shake."
substeps: Pour into a large glass. The salt is essential — it transforms the flavour from "sad gym shake" to "Maccas thick shake."

plates.description: Slow-cooked pork shoulder shredded and tossed in tangy BBQ sauce.
Brioche bun, melty cheese, slaw on top — the American classic, bulker-sized.

additional_instructions.summary: Split and lightly toast the brioche bun (cut side down in a dry pan, 1 minute).
substeps: Split and lightly toast the brioche bun (cut side down in a dry pan, 1 minute).

additional_instructions.summary: Pile 1 serving of BBQ pulled pork onto the bottom bun.
substeps: Pile 1 serving of BBQ pulled pork onto the bottom bun.

additional_instructions.summary: Scatter grated cheese over the hot pork — residual heat melts it.
substeps: Scatter grated cheese over the hot pork — residual heat melts it.

additional_instructions.summary: Top with coleslaw, lid on, eat immediately.
substeps: Top with coleslaw, lid on, eat immediately.

plates.description: Bed of basmati, BBQ pork, slaw on the side, cheese on top. Easiest weeknight plate.

additional_ingredients.notes: Optional drizzle, or use leftover BBQ sauce from the base recipe.

additional_instructions.summary: Cook the basmati rice if not already prepared (10 minutes in a rice cooker or boiling).
substeps: Cook the basmati rice if not already prepared (10 minutes in a rice cooker or boiling).

additional_instructions.summary: Spread rice across the bottom of a bowl.
substeps: Spread rice across the bottom of a bowl.

additional_instructions.summary: Pile 1 serving of BBQ pulled pork on one side of the rice; coleslaw on the other side.
substeps: Pile 1 serving of BBQ pulled pork on one side of the rice; coleslaw on the other side.

additional_instructions.summary: Scatter cheese over the pork; drizzle extra BBQ sauce.
substeps: Scatter cheese over the pork; drizzle extra BBQ sauce.

plates.description: Three soft tortillas, plain shredded pork, smashed avo, cheese, coriander, lime.
plates.reserve_before_finishing_note: Reserve approximately 151g of plain shredded pork before tossing the rest with BBQ sauce. This plate uses unsauced pork — BBQ flavour conflicts with the Mexican plate.

additional_ingredients.notes: Approximately half a medium avocado, flesh only.

additional_instructions.summary: Warm the reserved plain shredded pork in a pan with a splash of water — about 2 minutes.
substeps: Warm the reserved plain shredded pork in a pan with a splash of water — about 2 minutes.

additional_instructions.summary: Warm tortillas (30 sec per side in a dry pan, or 15 sec in microwave under a damp cloth).
substeps: Warm tortillas (30 sec per side in a dry pan, or 15 sec in microwave under a damp cloth).

additional_instructions.summary: Mash avocado roughly with a fork; squeeze in half the lime, pinch of salt.
substeps: Mash avocado roughly with a fork; squeeze in half the lime, pinch of salt.

additional_instructions.summary: Divide pork between the three tortillas (~50g each). Top each with smashed avocado, cheese, coriander, pickled red onion. Squeeze remaining lime over.
substeps: Divide pork between the three tortillas (~50g each). Top each with smashed avocado, cheese, coriander, pickled red onion. Squeeze remaining lime over.

plates.description: Whole baked potato, split and stuffed with BBQ pork, cheese, sour cream, spring onion.

additional_instructions.summary: Preheat oven to 200°C. Prick the potato all over with a fork. Rub with olive oil and salt.
substeps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Prick the potato all over with a fork. Rub with olive oil and salt.

additional_instructions.summary: Bake directly on the oven rack for 60 minutes, until skin is crisp and inside gives easily when squeezed.
substeps: Bake directly on the oven rack for 60 minutes, until skin is crisp and inside gives easily when squeezed.

additional_instructions.summary: Split the potato open lengthways. Fluff the flesh with a fork.
substeps: Split the potato open lengthways. Fluff the flesh with a fork.

additional_instructions.summary: Pile in 1 serving of BBQ pulled pork. Scatter cheese (residual heat melts it), dollop sour cream, scatter spring onion.
substeps: Pile in 1 serving of BBQ pulled pork. Scatter cheese (residual heat melts it), dollop sour cream, scatter spring onion.

plates.description: Stovetop mac and cheese topped with a chonky portion of BBQ pork. Treat night.
plates.image_filename: Pulled Pork Mac & Cheese Stack ⚡ STUNT PLATE (mac_cheese).png

additional_instructions.summary: Cook macaroni in salted boiling water until al dente (about 7 minutes). Reserve ½ cup of pasta water, then drain.
substeps: Cook macaroni in salted boiling water until al dente (about 7 minutes). Reserve ½ cup of pasta water, then drain.

additional_instructions.summary: In the same pot, melt butter over medium heat. Whisk in flour, cook 30 seconds. Gradually whisk in milk until smooth.
substeps: In the same pot, melt butter over medium heat. Whisk in flour, cook 30 seconds. Gradually whisk in milk until smooth.

additional_instructions.summary: Simmer 2-3 minutes, whisking, until thickened. Stir in grated cheese off the heat until melted. Season.
substeps: Simmer 2-3 minutes, whisking, until thickened. Stir in grated cheese off the heat until melted. Season.

additional_instructions.summary: Stir drained macaroni through the cheese sauce. Loosen with a splash of pasta water if needed.
substeps: Stir drained macaroni through the cheese sauce. Loosen with a splash of pasta water if needed.

additional_instructions.summary: Scoop mac and cheese into a bowl. Top with 1.5 servings' worth of BBQ pulled pork.
substeps: Scoop mac and cheese into a bowl. Top with 1.5 servings' worth of BBQ pulled pork.

ingredients.notes: Pour around the pork, not over the rub.

instructions.summary: Mix the rub ingredients and rub generously all over the pork shoulder, including the fat cap. If time permits, marinate in the fridge for an hour.
substeps: Mix the rub ingredients and rub generously all over the pork shoulder, including the fat cap. If time permits, marinate in the fridge for an hour.

instructions.summary: Place pork in the slow cooker, fat cap facing up. Pour the apple juice around the pork — not over the rub.
substeps: Place pork in the slow cooker, fat cap facing up. Pour the apple juice around the pork — not over the rub.

instructions.summary: Cook on low for 8 hours, or high for 4-5 hours. Pork is done when it shreds easily under light fork pressure.
substeps: Cook on low for 8 hours, or high for 4-5 hours. Pork is done when it shreds easily under light fork pressure.

instructions.summary: Shred the pork with two forks, discarding any large gristle pieces.
substeps: Shred the pork with two forks, discarding any large gristle pieces.

instructions.summary: Pour BBQ sauce over the shredded pork and toss to coat generously.
substeps: Pour BBQ sauce over the shredded pork and toss to coat generously.

instructions.summary: Preheat the oven to 140°C (fan-forced 120°C).
substeps: Preheat the oven to 140°C (fan-forced 120°C).

instructions.summary: Rub the pork all over, place in a deep roasting pan fat-cap up, and pour apple juice around it.
substeps: Rub the pork all over, place in a deep roasting pan fat-cap up, and pour apple juice around it.

instructions.summary: Cover tightly with foil and cook for 5 hours, until the pork gives way when pressed.
substeps: Cover tightly with foil and cook for 5 hours, until the pork gives way when pressed.

instructions.summary: Shred the pork and toss with the BBQ sauce.
substeps: Shred the pork and toss with the BBQ sauce.
